extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted the criminal rows against the Company (1) and Promoters (1), while excluding all “By” rows; regulatory proceedings against the Company were 3, and tax proceedings against the Company (23) plus Subsidiary (5) were counted separately. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiary was ₹13.63 million plus ₹31.18 million, excluding the Promoters’ “Not quantifiable” amount, totaling ₹44.81 million, or ₹4.481 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is stated on a consolidated basis as of September 30, 2022; because no Total row is provided, the disclosed components of ₹40.40 million, ₹13.74 million and ₹44.81 million were summed to ₹98.95 million, or ₹9.895 crore. The latest full fiscal-year customer concentration is Fiscal 2022, measured as a percentage of company-wide revenue from operations: top five customers 63.20% and top ten customers 77.14%. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing by 10 (₹44.81 million ÷ 10 = ₹4.481 crore; ₹98.95 million ÷ 10 = ₹9.895 crore).
